subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided with the light of guidance! Thank thou God that thou hast found a new sight and obtained a new hearing. Thou hast witnessed the Light of Guidance
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدایت شکر کن خدا را که دیده بینا و گوش شنوا یافتی نور هدی دیدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
